claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, virtualization, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: json-viewer: div role=region; json-tree: div role=tree; json-tree-item: div role=treeitem; json-copy-path: button; json-copy-value: button
semantics.rolePolicy: The flat DOM tree supplies aria-level, posinset, setsize, expanded, and selected state. Roving focus follows APG tree arrows, Home/End, Enter/Space, and sibling expansion; toolbar buttons copy the selected path or value.

keyboard.behavior: Moves among copy controls and the single active tree item; tree internals use roving focus.
Moves to the previous or next visible tree item.
Expands a closed container or moves to its first child.
Collapses an open container or moves to its parent.
Moves to the first or last visible tree item.
Toggles the focused container without activating twice.
Expands every expandable sibling at the focused level.

nonColor: Disclosure glyphs, type text, selected state, aria-expanded, and aria-selected remain present when authored colors are removed.
responsive: Logical properties, intrinsic minimums, wrapping, and component-owned overflow preserve content at 320 CSS pixels, 200% text, and 400% reflow; evidence remains unrecorded.
consumerResponsibilities: Preserve native elements, owned roles, labels, relationships, state attributes, and DOM reading order when composing or styling this item.
Localize visible and spoken strings and retest long values, bidirectional content, focus, text spacing, zoom, and forced colors after overrides.
The tree intentionally uses bounded native scrolling. Virtualization is not implemented or claimed; Class 3 scale, mobile AT, voice, switch, and independent manual evidence remain promotion gates.
